/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libbzzz_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libbzzz_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/bzzz_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/bzzz_msgs/msg/motor_commands__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bzzz_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/bzzz_msgs/msg/sensor_suite__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mbell/bzzz_ws/build/bzzz_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libbzzz_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
